steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks what change coincided with Don Jerónimo becoming a patron. The passage states he “ceased to write plays and assumed instead the nobler rôle of patron.” That word “instead” directly links stopping playwriting to becoming a patron.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'He achieved public recognition for a poem he had written earlier.': the passage mentions a play, not a poem, and says it won him “hisses,” not recognition. ✗
  • Choice B — 'He accepted a new job as an actor.': the passage says he became a patron, not an actor. ✗
  • Choice C — 'He stopped writing plays.': directly matches “ceased to write plays.” ✓
  • Choice D — 'He moved to a town outside of Madrid.': no move is mentioned in the passage. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
